steps.title: Use the citation clue
steps.content: The sentence says Hart's work is frequently cited and then explains that other economists find her studies valuable. The blank must mean that frequent citation highlights the usefulness of her research.

steps.title: Reject negative meanings
steps.content: A would mean reducing the importance of her work. C would mean preventing something. D would mean contradicting or disguising the usefulness of her research. None matches the positive evidence. The answer is B.
